optimizations.description: Inlined critical CSS for above-fold content
optimizations.implementation: Critical CSS should be inlined in HTML head

optimizations.description: Modern image formats (WebP/AVIF) with responsive loading
optimizations.implementation: Use <picture> element with WebP/AVIF sources and lazy loading

optimizations.description: Optimized font loading with preconnect and font-display: swap
optimizations.implementation: Preconnect to font domains and use variable fonts

optimizations.description: JavaScript optimization: defer loading, tree shaking, code splitting
optimizations.implementation: Use defer/async attributes, implement code splitting

optimizations.description: Added DNS prefetch, preconnect, and preload hints
optimizations.implementation: Resource hints in HTML head for critical origins

optimizations.description: Optimized caching strategy for different resource types
optimizations.implementation: Cache-Control headers configured for optimal caching

optimizations.description: Ensure all interactive elements are keyboard accessible
optimizations.implementation: Add tabindex, focus management, and keyboard event handlers

optimizations.description: Add descriptive alt text to all images
optimizations.implementation: Review all img elements and add appropriate alt attributes

optimizations.description: Ensure minimum color contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text)
optimizations.implementation: Update color palette to meet WCAG AA standards

optimizations.description: Use proper semantic HTML5 elements
optimizations.implementation: Replace divs with header, nav, main, section, article, aside, footer

optimizations.description: Add visible focus indicators for keyboard navigation
optimizations.implementation: Custom :focus-visible styles with high contrast

optimizations.description: Add skip links for keyboard navigation
optimizations.implementation: Add hidden skip links that appear on focus

optimizations.description: Add ARIA labels for custom components
optimizations.implementation: Add aria-label, aria-describedby, role attributes

optimizations.description: Associate form inputs with proper labels
optimizations.implementation: Add label elements with for attributes or aria-label

optimizations.description: Optimize title tags and meta descriptions
optimizations.implementation: Unique titles (50-60 chars) and descriptions (150-160 chars) for each page

optimizations.description: Add comprehensive JSON-LD structured data
optimizations.implementation: Organization, Article, Product, Breadcrumb, FAQ schemas

optimizations.description: Generate comprehensive XML sitemap
optimizations.implementation: Include all pages with proper lastmod and priority values

optimizations.description: Optimize robots.txt for proper crawling
optimizations.implementation: Allow important pages, disallow admin areas, include sitemap

optimizations.description: Add canonical URLs to prevent duplicate content
optimizations.implementation: Self-referencing canonical on each page

optimizations.description: Proper heading hierarchy (single h1, logical h2-h6)
optimizations.implementation: Audit and restructure headings for semantic hierarchy

optimizations.description: Strategic internal linking with descriptive anchor text
optimizations.implementation: Link to related content with keyword-rich anchor text

optimizations.description: Optimize page speed for SEO ranking factors
optimizations.implementation: Core Web Vitals optimization for better search rankings

optimizations.description: Reduce Time to First Byte (TTFB)
optimizations.implementation: Use CDN, enable compression, optimize backend

optimizations.description: Eliminate render-blocking resources
optimizations.implementation: Inline critical CSS, defer non-critical scripts

optimizations.description: Optimize LCP element loading
optimizations.target: Preload LCP image with high priority
optimizations.implementation: Identify and preload LCP element

optimizations.description: Reduce JavaScript execution time
optimizations.implementation: Code splitting, lazy loading, web workers

optimizations.description: Optimize event handler performance
optimizations.implementation: Use requestAnimationFrame, debounce scroll/resize

optimizations.description: Prevent cumulative layout shift
optimizations.implementation: Set dimensions on images/videos, reserve space for ads

optimizations.description: Prevent layout shift from fonts
optimizations.implementation: System font fallbacks, font loading strategies

optimizations.description: Implement comprehensive security headers
optimizations.implementation: HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options

optimizations.description: Enforce HTTPS everywhere
optimizations.implementation: No mixed content, all resources use HTTPS

optimizations.description: Use modern web APIs
optimizations.implementation: Intersection Observer, Resize Observer, Web Workers

optimizations.description: Implement proper error handling
optimizations.implementation: Try-catch blocks, error boundaries, graceful degradation

optimizations.description: Ensure cross-browser compatibility
optimizations.implementation: Feature detection, polyfills, progressive enhancement
